## omqctl queue requeue

Requeue pulled items

### Synopsis

The 'queue requeue' command returns previously pulled items back to the queue.

```
omqctl queue requeue <queue> [flags]
```

### Options

```
  -h, --help           help for requeue
      --ids string     Comma-separated list of item IDs to requeue
      --ttl duration   New TTL for requeued items
```

* [omqctl queue](omqctl_queue.md)	 - Manage OctopusMQ queues
